name: the-world-as-it-is
description: Ben Rhodes' memoir of the Obama White House — navigating crisis decisions, bureaucratic resistance, disinformation, and the gap between ideals and reality in high-stakes leadership.
useCase: Crisis decision-making under uncertainty, navigating organizational resistance, defending against disinformation, staying grounded close to power.
knownRisks: Rhodes was a partisan actor — the book reflects his perspective
White House experience may not translate directly to other contexts
Some may find the insider's perspective uncomfortably self-serving
